name: trace-my-code
description: An agent skill that makes your coding agent fluent in your codebase. A living trace of domain, architecture, and patterns it reads before building — so features fit and nothing gets rebuilt.

interface.shortDescription: Make your coding agent fluent in your codebase
interface.longDescription: Make your coding agent fluent in your codebase. A living trace of domain, architecture, and patterns it reads before building — so features fit and nothing gets rebuilt.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap the trace for this repo.
Plan this feature using the trace (reuse-first).
Refresh the architecture docs for what changed.
